# PlaygroundValue.integer(_:)

**Enumeration Case**

A value that represents an integer.

## Declaration

```swift
case integer(Int)
```

## Representing Data

- **PlaygroundValue.boolean(_:)**: A value that represents a Boolean.
- **PlaygroundValue.data(_:)**: A value that represents raw data.
- **PlaygroundValue.date(_:)**: A value that represents a date.
- **PlaygroundValue.floatingPoint(_:)**: A value that represents a floating-point number.
- **PlaygroundValue.string(_:)**: A value that represents a string.
